tEn: Spectral Normalization for Generative Adversarial Networks
tZh: 生成对抗网络的谱归一化
sEn: Spectral normalization stabilizes GAN training by normalizing the weight matrix's spectral norm, improving image generation quality.
sZh: 谱归一化通过归一化权重矩阵的谱范数来稳定GAN训练，提升图像生成质量。
absEn: One of the challenges in the study of generative adversarial networks is the instability of its training. In this paper, we propose a novel weight normalization technique called spectral normalization to stabilize the training of the discriminator. Our new normalization technique is computationally light and easy to incorporate into existing implementations. We tested the efficacy of spectral normalization on CIFAR10, STL-10, and ILSVRC2012 dataset, and we experimentally confirmed that spectrally normalized GANs (SN-GANs) is capable of generating images of better or equal quality relative to the previous training stabilization techniques.
absZh: 生成对抗网络研究中的一个挑战是其训练的不稳定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的权重归一化技术，称为谱归一化，以稳定判别器的训练。我们的新归一化技术计算量轻，易于融入现有实现。我们在CIFAR10、STL-10和ILSVRC2012数据集上测试了谱归一化的效果，并通过实验证实，谱归一化GAN（SN-GAN）能够生成相对于先前训练稳定技术更好或同等质量的图像。

contrib.en: Proposes spectral normalization to stabilize GAN training by constraining the Lipschitz constant of the discriminator.
contrib.zh: 提出频谱归一化，通过约束判别器的Lipschitz常数来稳定GAN训练。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that spectral normalization is computationally light and easy to integrate into existing GAN implementations.
contrib.zh: 证明频谱归一化计算量小且易于集成到现有GAN实现中。

contrib.en: Shows that spectral normalization allows the discriminator to use more features compared to weight normalization, avoiding rank deficiency.
contrib.zh: 表明频谱归一化允许判别器使用更多特征，避免权重归一化导致的秩亏缺问题。

contrib.en: Achieves better or comparable image quality on CIFAR-10, STL-10, and ImageNet relative to previous stabilization techniques.
contrib.zh: 在CIFAR-10、STL-10和ImageNet上获得优于或相当于先前稳定技术的图像质量。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical analysis linking spectral normalization to Lipschitz continuity and regularization of the discriminator.
contrib.zh: 提供理论分析，将频谱归一化与判别器的Lipschitz连续性和正则化联系起来。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robustness to aggressive learning rates and momentum parameters, outperforming WGAN-GP in such settings.
contrib.zh: 展示了对激进学习率和动量参数的鲁棒性，在此类设置中优于WGAN-GP。

limits.en: The method is evaluated only on image generation tasks; its effectiveness on other data modalities is not explored.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在图像生成任务上评估，未探索其他数据模态的有效性。

limits.en: Spectral normalization requires power iteration to estimate the spectral norm, adding slight computational overhead.
limits.zh: 频谱归一化需要幂迭代估计谱范数，增加了轻微的计算开销。

limits.en: The study does not provide a theoretical guarantee for the optimality of spectral normalization in all GAN settings.
limits.zh: 研究未提供频谱归一化在所有GAN设置中最优性的理论保证。

limits.en: Performance on very large-scale datasets beyond ImageNet (e.g., video or 3D data) is not tested.
limits.zh: 未在ImageNet之外的大规模数据集（如视频或3D数据）上测试性能。

limits.en: The method's interaction with other regularization techniques (e.g., batch normalization) is not fully investigated.
limits.zh: 该方法与其他正则化技术（如批归一化）的相互作用未充分研究。

items.en: One of the challenges in the study of generative adversarial networks is the instability of its training. In this paper, we propose a novel weight normalization technique called spectral normalization to stabilize the training of the discriminator. Our new normalization technique is computationally light and easy to incorporate into existing implementations. We tested the efficacy of spectral normalization on CIFAR10, STL-10, and ILSVRC2012 dataset, and we experimentally confirmed that spectrally normalized GANs (SN-GANs) is capable of generating images of better or equal quality relative to the previous training stabilization techniques. The code with Chainer Tokui et al. (2015), generated images and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/pfnet-research/sngan_projection.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络研究中的一个挑战是其训练的不稳定性。本文提出了一种新颖的权重归一化方法，称为谱归一化，以稳定判别器的训练。我们的新归一化技术计算量轻，易于融入现有实现。我们在CIFAR10、STL-10和ILSVRC2012数据集上测试了谱归一化的有效性，并实验证实谱归一化GAN（SN-GAN）能够生成与先前训练稳定技术相比质量更好或相当的图像。使用Chainer（Tokui等人，2015）的代码、生成的图像和预训练模型可在https://github.com/pfnet-research/sngan_projection获取。

items.en: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) Goodfellow et al. (2014) have been enjoying considerable success as a framework of generative models in recent years, and it has been applied to numerous types of tasks and datasets Radford et al. (2016); Salimans et al. (2016); Ho & Ermon (2016); Li et al. (2017). In a nutshell, GANs are a framework to produce a model distribution that mimics a given target distribution, and it consists of a generator that produces the model distribution and a discriminator that distinguishes the model distribution from the target. The concept is to consecutively train the model distribution and the discriminator in turn, with the goal of reducing the difference between the model distribution and the target distribution measured by the best discriminator possible at each step of the training. GANs have been drawing attention in the machine learning community not only for its ability to learn highly structured probability distribution but also for its theoretically interesting aspects. For example, Nowozin et al. (2016); Uehara et al. (2016); Mohamed & Lakshminarayanan (2017) revealed that the training of the discriminator amounts to the training of a good estimator for the density ratio between the model distribution and the target. This is a perspective that opens the door to the methods of implicit models Mohamed & Lakshminarayanan (2017); Tran et al. (2017) that can be used to carry out variational optimization without the direct knowledge of the density function.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）（Goodfellow等人，2014）近年来作为生成模型框架取得了相当大的成功，并已应用于多种类型的任务和数据集（Radford等人，2016；Salimans等人，2016；Ho & Ermon，2016；Li等人，2017）。简而言之，GAN是一个产生模仿给定目标分布的模型分布的框架，它由一个生成模型分布的生成器和一个区分模型分布与目标分布的判别器组成。其概念是交替训练模型分布和判别器，目标是在每一步训练中通过尽可能好的判别器来减少模型分布与目标分布之间的差异。GAN不仅因其学习高度结构化概率分布的能力，还因其理论上有趣的方面而引起了机器学习界的关注。例如，Nowozin等人（2016）；Uehara等人（2016）；Mohamed & Lakshminarayanan（2017）揭示了判别器的训练相当于训练一个用于模型分布与目标之间密度比的好估计器。这一视角为隐式模型方法（Mohamed & Lakshminarayanan，2017；Tran等人，2017）打开了大门，这些方法可以在不直接知道密度函数的情况下进行变分优化。

items.en: A persisting challenge in the training of GANs is the performance control of the discriminator. In high dimensional spaces, the density ratio estimation by the discriminator is often inaccurate and unstable during the training, and generator networks fail to learn the multimodal structure of the target distribution. Even worse, when the support of the model distribution and the support of the target distribution are disjoint, there exists a discriminator that can perfectly distinguish the model distribution from the target Arjovsky & Bottou (2017). Once such discriminator is produced in this situation, the training of the generator comes to complete stop, because the derivative of the so-produced discriminator with respect to the input turns out to be 0. This motivates us to introduce some form of restriction to the choice of the discriminator.
items.zh: GAN训练中的一个持续挑战是判别器的性能控制。在高维空间中，判别器对密度比的估计在训练过程中常常不准确且不稳定，生成器网络无法学习目标分布的多模态结构。更糟糕的是，当模型分布的支持集与目标分布的支持集不相交时，存在一个可以完美区分模型分布与目标的判别器（Arjovsky & Bottou，2017）。一旦在这种情况下产生这样的判别器，生成器的训练就会完全停止，因为如此产生的判别器对输入的导数变为0。这促使我们对判别器的选择引入某种形式的限制。

items.en: In this paper, we propose a novel weight normalization method called spectral normalization that can stabilize the training of discriminator networks. Our normalization enjoys following favorable properties.
items.zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的权重归一化方法，称为谱归一化，可以稳定判别器网络的训练。我们的归一化具有以下有利特性。

items.en: Lipschitz constant is the only hyper-parameter to be tuned, and the algorithm does not require intensive tuning of the only hyper-parameter for satisfactory performance.
items.zh: Lipschitz常数是唯一需要调整的超参数，并且该算法不需要对唯一的超参数进行密集调整即可获得令人满意的性能。

items.en: Implementation is simple and the additional computational cost is small.
items.zh: 实现简单且额外计算成本小。

items.en: In fact, our normalization method also functioned well even without tuning Lipschitz constant, which is the only hyper parameter. In this study, we provide explanations of the effectiveness of spectral normalization for GANs against other regularization techniques, such as weight normalization Salimans & Kingma (2016), weight clipping Arjovsky et al. (2017), and gradient penalty Gulrajani et al. (2017). We also show that, in the absence of complimentary regularization techniques (e.g., batch normalization, weight decay and feature matching on the discriminator), spectral normalization can improve the sheer quality of the generated images better than weight normalization and gradient penalty.
items.zh: 事实上，即使不调整唯一的超参数Lipschitz常数，我们的归一化方法也能很好地工作。在本研究中，我们解释了谱归一化对GAN相对于其他正则化技术（如权重归一化（Salimans & Kingma，2016）、权重裁剪（Arjovsky等人，2017）和梯度惩罚（Gulrajani等人，2017））的有效性。我们还表明，在没有补充正则化技术（例如，判别器上的批归一化、权重衰减和特征匹配）的情况下，谱归一化可以比权重归一化和梯度惩罚更好地提高生成图像的纯粹质量。

items.en: While input based regularizations allow for relatively easy formulations based on samples, they also suffer from the fact that, they cannot impose regularization on the space outside of the supports of the generator and data distributions without introducing somewhat heuristic means. A method we would introduce in this paper, called spectral normalization, is a method that aims to skirt this issue by normalizing the weight matrices using the technique devised by Yoshida & Miyato (2017).
items.zh: 虽然基于输入的正则化允许基于样本的相对简单的公式，但它们也存在一个问题：无法在不引入某种启发式手段的情况下对生成器和数据分布支持集之外的空间施加正则化。本文介绍的一种方法，称为谱归一化，旨在通过使用Yoshida & Miyato（2017）设计的技术对权重矩阵进行归一化来规避这个问题。

items.en: Here, we would like to emphasize the difference between our spectral normalization and spectral norm ”regularization” introduced by Yoshida & Miyato (2017). Unlike our method, spectral norm ”regularization” penalizes the spectral norm by adding explicit regularization term to the objective function. Their method is fundamentally different from our method in that they do not make an attempt to ‘set’ the spectral norm to a designated value. Moreover, when we reorganize the derivative of our normalized cost function and rewrite our objective function (12), we see that our method is augmenting the cost function with a sample data dependent regularization function. Spectral norm regularization, on the other hand, imposes sample data independent regularization on the cost function, just like L2 regularization and Lasso.
items.zh: 在此，我们想强调我们的谱归一化与Yoshida & Miyato (2017)引入的谱范数“正则化”之间的区别。与我们的方法不同，谱范数“正则化”通过在目标函数中添加显式正则化项来惩罚谱范数。他们的方法与我们的方法有根本不同，因为他们并不试图将谱范数“设置”为指定值。此外，当我们重新整理归一化代价函数的导数并重写目标函数(12)时，我们发现我们的方法是用一个依赖于样本数据的正则化函数来增强代价函数。而谱范数正则化则对代价函数施加与样本数据无关的正则化，就像L2正则化和Lasso一样。

full.sec: 2.2 Fast Approximation of the Spectral Norm σ​(W)𝜎𝑊\sigma(W)

items.en: As we mentioned above, the spectral norm σ​(W)𝜎𝑊\sigma(W) that we use to regularize each layer of the discriminator is the largest singular value of W𝑊W. If we naively apply singular value decomposition to compute the σ​(W)𝜎𝑊\sigma(W) at each round of the algorithm, the algorithm can become computationally heavy. Instead, we can use the power iteration method to estimate σ​(W)𝜎𝑊\sigma(W) Golub & Van der Vorst (2000); Yoshida & Miyato (2017). With power iteration method, we can estimate the spectral norm with very small additional computational time relative to the full computational cost of the vanilla GANs. Please see Appendix A for the detail method and Algorithm 1 for the summary of the actual spectral normalization algorithm.
items.zh: 如上所述，我们用于正则化判别器每一层的谱范数σ(W)是W的最大奇异值。如果我们在算法的每一轮都朴素地应用奇异值分解来计算σ(W)，算法可能会变得计算量很大。相反，我们可以使用幂迭代法来估计σ(W) (Golub & Van der Vorst, 2000; Yoshida & Miyato, 2017)。使用幂迭代法，我们可以在相对于原始GANs总计算成本非常小的额外计算时间内估计谱范数。详细方法见附录A，实际谱归一化算法的总结见算法1。

items.en: We would like to comment on the implication of (12). The first term E^​[𝜹​𝒉T]^Edelimited-[]𝜹superscript𝒉T\hat{\mathop{\mathrm{E}}}\left[{\bm{\delta}}{\bm{h}}^{\rm T}\right] is the same as the derivative of the weights without normalization. In this light, the second term in the expression can be seen as the regularization term penalizing the first singular components with the adaptive regularization coefficient λ𝜆\lambda. λ𝜆\lambda is positive when 𝜹𝜹{\bm{\delta}} and W¯SN​𝒉subscript¯𝑊SN𝒉\bar{W}_{\rm SN}{\bm{h}} are pointing in similar direction, and this prevents the column space of W𝑊W from concentrating into one particular direction in the course of the training. In other words, spectral normalization prevents the transformation of each layer from becoming to sensitive in one direction. We can also use spectral normalization to devise a new parametrization for the model. Namely, we can split the layer map into two separate trainable components: spectrally normalized map and the spectral norm constant. As it turns out, this parametrization has its merit on its own and promotes the performance of GANs (See Appendix E).
items.zh: 我们想评论一下(12)的含义。第一项Ê[δ h^T]与未归一化权重的导数相同。从这个角度看，表达式中的第二项可以看作是用自适应正则化系数λ惩罚第一奇异分量的正则化项。当δ和W̄_SN h指向相似方向时，λ为正，这防止了W的列空间在训练过程中集中到某个特定方向。换句话说，谱归一化防止了每一层的变换对某一方向变得过于敏感。我们还可以使用谱归一化为模型设计新的参数化。即，我们可以将层映射拆分为两个独立的可训练组件：谱归一化映射和谱范数常数。事实证明，这种参数化本身有其优点，并提升了GANs的性能（见附录E）。

full.sec: 3 Spectral Normalization vs Other Regularization Techniques
full.secZh: 3 谱归一化与其他正则化技术的比较

items.en: The weight normalization introduced by Salimans & Kingma (2016) is a method that normalizes the ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} norm of each row vector in the weight matrix. Mathematically, this is equivalent to requiring the weight by the weight normalization W¯WNsubscript¯𝑊WN\bar{W}_{\rm WN}:
items.zh: Salimans & Kingma (2016)引入的权重归一化是一种归一化权重矩阵中每个行向量的ℓ₂范数的方法。数学上，这等价于要求权重归一化W̄_WN满足：

items.en: where σt​(A)subscript𝜎𝑡𝐴\sigma_{t}(A) is a t𝑡t-th singular value of matrix A𝐴A. Therefore, up to a scaler, this is same as the Frobenius normalization, which requires the sum of the squared singular values to be 1. These normalizations, however, inadvertently impose much stronger constraint on the matrix than intended. If W¯WNsubscript¯𝑊WN\bar{W}_{\rm WN} is the weight normalized matrix of dimension di×dosubscript𝑑𝑖subscript𝑑𝑜d_{i}\times d_{o}, the norm ‖W¯WN​𝒉‖2subscriptnormsubscript¯𝑊WN𝒉2\|\bar{W}_{\rm WN}{\bm{h}}\|_{2} for a fixed unit vector 𝒉𝒉{\bm{h}} is maximized at ‖W¯WN​𝒉‖2=dosubscriptnormsubscript¯𝑊WN𝒉2subscript𝑑𝑜\|\bar{W}_{\rm WN}{\bm{h}}\|_{2}=\sqrt{d_{o}} when σ1​(W¯WN)=dosubscript𝜎1subscript¯𝑊WNsubscript𝑑𝑜\sigma_{1}(\bar{W}_{\rm WN})=\sqrt{d_{o}} and σt​(W¯WN)=0subscript𝜎𝑡subscript¯𝑊WN0\sigma_{t}(\bar{W}_{\rm WN})=0 for t=2,…,T𝑡2…𝑇t=2,\dots,T, which means that W¯WNsubscript¯𝑊WN\bar{W}_{\rm WN} is of rank one. Similar thing can be said to the Frobenius normalization (See the appendix for more details). Using such W¯WNsubscript¯𝑊WN\bar{W}_{\rm WN} corresponds to using only one feature to discriminate the model probability distribution from the target. In order to retain as much norm of the input as possible and hence to make the discriminator more sensitive, one would hope to make the norm of W¯WN​𝒉subscript¯𝑊WN𝒉\bar{W}_{\rm WN}{\bm{h}} large. For weight normalization, however, this comes at the cost of reducing the rank and hence the number of features to be used for the discriminator. Thus, there is a conflict of interests between weight normalization and our desire to use as many features as possible to distinguish the generator distribution from the target distribution. The former interest often reigns over the other in many cases, inadvertently diminishing the number of features to be used by the discriminators. Consequently, the algorithm would produce a rather arbitrary model distribution that matches the target distribution only at select few features. Weight clipping Arjovsky et al. (2017) also suffers from same pitfall.
items.zh: 其中σ_t(A)是矩阵A的第t个奇异值。因此，在标量范围内，这与Frobenius归一化相同，后者要求奇异值的平方和为1。然而，这些归一化无意中对矩阵施加了比预期更强的约束。如果W̄_WN是维度为d_i × d_o的权重归一化矩阵，则对于固定的单位向量h，范数‖W̄_WN h‖₂在σ₁(W̄_WN)=√d_o且σ_t(W̄_WN)=0 (t=2,…,T)时取最大值‖W̄_WN h‖₂=√d_o，这意味着W̄_WN是秩一的。类似的情况也适用于Frobenius归一化（详见附录）。使用这样的W̄_WN相当于只使用一个特征来区分模型概率分布与目标分布。为了尽可能多地保留输入的范数，从而使判别器更敏感，人们希望使W̄_WN h的范数更大。然而，对于权重归一化，这是以降低秩从而减少判别器使用的特征数量为代价的。因此，权重归一化与我们希望使用尽可能多的特征来区分生成器分布与目标分布之间存在利益冲突。在许多情况下，前者往往压倒后者，无意中减少了判别器使用的特征数量。结果，算法会产生一个相当任意的模型分布，仅在少数几个特征上与目标分布匹配。权重裁剪 (Arjovsky et al., 2017) 也存在同样的问题。

items.en: Our spectral normalization, on the other hand, do not suffer from such a conflict in interest. Note that the Lipschitz constant of a linear operator is determined only by the maximum singular value. In other words, the spectral norm is independent of rank. Thus, unlike the weight normalization, our spectral normalization allows the parameter matrix to use as many features as possible while satisfying local 111-Lipschitz constraint. Our spectral normalization leaves more freedom in choosing the number of singular components (features) to feed to the next layer of the discriminator.
items.zh: 另一方面，我们的谱归一化不存在这种利益冲突。注意，线性算子的Lipschitz常数仅由最大奇异值决定。换句话说，谱范数与秩无关。因此，与权重归一化不同，我们的谱归一化允许参数矩阵在满足局部1-Lipschitz约束的同时使用尽可能多的特征。我们的谱归一化为选择输入到判别器下一层的奇异分量（特征）数量留下了更多自由度。

items.en: Brock et al. (2016) introduced orthonormal regularization on each weight to stabilize the training of GANs. In their work, Brock et al. (2016) augmented the adversarial objective function by adding the following term:
items.zh: Brock et al. (2016) 引入了每个权重的正交归一化正则化来稳定GANs的训练。在他们的工作中，Brock et al. (2016) 通过添加以下项来增强对抗目标函数：

items.en: While this seems to serve the same purpose as spectral normalization, orthonormal regularization are mathematically quite different from our spectral normalization because the orthonormal regularization destroys the information about the spectrum by setting all the singular values to one. On the other hand, spectral normalization only scales the spectrum so that the its maximum will be one.
items.zh: 虽然这看起来与谱归一化目的相同，但正交归一化正则化在数学上与我们的谱归一化有很大不同，因为正交归一化正则化通过将所有奇异值设置为1来破坏谱的信息。另一方面，谱归一化仅缩放谱，使其最大值变为1。

items.en: Gulrajani et al. (2017) used Gradient penalty method in combination with WGAN. In their work, they placed K𝐾K-Lipschitz constant on the discriminator by augmenting the objective function with the regularizer that rewards the function for having local 1-Lipschitz constant (i.e. ‖∇𝒙^f‖2=1subscriptnormsubscript∇^𝒙𝑓21\|\nabla_{\hat{{\bm{x}}}}f\|_{2}=1) at discrete sets of points of the form 𝒙^:=ϵ​𝒙~+(1−ϵ)​𝒙assign^𝒙italic-ϵ~𝒙1italic-ϵ𝒙\hat{{\bm{x}}}:=\epsilon\tilde{\bm{x}}+(1-\epsilon){\bm{x}} generated by interpolating a sample 𝒙~~𝒙\tilde{\bm{x}} from generative distribution and a sample 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} from the data distribution. While this rather straightforward approach does not suffer from the problems we mentioned above regarding the effective dimension of the feature space, the approach has an obvious weakness of being heavily dependent on the support of the current generative distribution. As a matter of course, the generative distribution and its support gradually changes in the course of the training, and this can destabilize the effect of such regularization. In fact, we empirically observed that a high learning rate can destabilize the performance of WGAN-GP. On the contrary, our spectral normalization regularizes the function the operator space, and the effect of the regularization is more stable with respect to the choice of the batch. Training with our spectral normalization does not easily destabilize with aggressive learning rate. Moreover, WGAN-GP requires more computational cost than our spectral normalization with single-step power iteration, because the computation of ‖∇𝒙^f‖2subscriptnormsubscript∇^𝒙𝑓2\|\nabla_{\hat{{\bm{x}}}}f\|_{2} requires one whole round of forward and backward propagation. In the appendix section, we compare the computational cost of the two methods for the same number of updates.
items.zh: Gulrajani et al. (2017) 将梯度惩罚方法与WGAN结合使用。在他们的工作中，他们通过向目标函数添加正则化项来对判别器施加K-Lipschitz常数，该正则化项奖励函数在离散点集上具有局部1-Lipschitz常数（即‖∇_x̂ f‖₂=1），这些点由插值生成分布样本x̃和数据分布样本x得到：x̂ := ϵ x̃ + (1-ϵ) x。虽然这种相当直接的方法不存在我们上面提到的关于特征空间有效维度的问题，但该方法有一个明显的弱点，即严重依赖于当前生成分布的支撑集。当然，生成分布及其支撑集在训练过程中逐渐变化，这可能会破坏这种正则化的效果。事实上，我们经验性地观察到，高学习率会破坏WGAN-GP的稳定性。相反，我们的谱归一化在算子空间中对函数进行正则化，并且正则化的效果对批次的选择更加稳定。使用我们的谱归一化进行训练，不会因激进的学习率而轻易失稳。此外，WGAN-GP比我们的单步幂迭代谱归一化需要更多的计算成本，因为计算‖∇_x̂ f‖₂需要一次完整的前向和反向传播。在附录部分，我们比较了两种方法在相同更新次数下的计算成本。

items.en: In order to evaluate the efficacy of our approach and investigate the reason behind its efficacy, we conducted a set of extensive experiments of unsupervised image generation on CIFAR-10 Torralba et al. (2008) and STL-10 Coates et al. (2011), and compared our method against other normalization techniques. To see how our method fares against large dataset, we also applied our method on ILSVRC2012 dataset (ImageNet) Russakovsky et al. (2015) as well. This section is structured as follows. First, we will discuss the objective functions we used to train the architecture, and then we will describe the optimization settings we used in the experiments. We will then explain two performance measures on the images to evaluate the images produced by the trained generators. Finally, we will summarize our results on CIFAR-10, STL-10, and ImageNet.
items.zh: 为了评估我们方法的有效性并探究其有效的原因，我们在CIFAR-10 (Torralba et al., 2008) 和 STL-10 (Coates et al., 2011) 上进行了一系列无监督图像生成的广泛实验，并将我们的方法与其他归一化技术进行了比较。为了了解我们的方法在大数据集上的表现，我们还将我们的方法应用于ILSVRC2012数据集（ImageNet）(Russakovsky et al., 2015)。本节结构如下。首先，我们将讨论用于训练架构的目标函数，然后描述实验中使用的优化设置。接着，我们将解释用于评估生成器生成图像质量的两种性能度量。最后，我们将总结在CIFAR-10、STL-10和ImageNet上的结果。

However, the answer will only differ by some predefined K𝐾K.. We trained the parameters of the generator with batch normalization Ioffe & Szegedy (2015). We refer the readers to Table 3 in the appendix section for more details of the architectures.

items.zh: 为了对生成的样本进行定量评估，我们使用了inception score (Salimans et al., 2016) 和 Fréchet inception distance (FID) (Heusel et al., 2017)。每个分数的详细信息请参见附录B.1。

items.en: For quantitative assessment of generated examples, we used inception score Salimans et al. (2016) and Fréchet inception distance (FID) Heusel et al. (2017). Please see Appendix B.1 for the details of each score.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们报告了训练过程中谱归一化（我们使用缩写SN-GAN表示谱归一化GANs）的准确性，以及算法性能对优化器超参数的依赖性。我们还将算法的性能质量与其他判别器网络的正则化/归一化技术进行了比较，包括：权重裁剪 (Arjovsky et al., 2017)、WGAN-GP (Gulrajani et al., 2017)、批归一化 (BN) (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015)、层归一化 (LN) (Ba et al., 2016)、权重归一化 (WN) (Salimans & Kingma, 2016) 和正交归一化正则化 (orthonormal) (Brock et al., 2016)。为了评估梯度惩罚的独立有效性，我们还将梯度惩罚项应用于GANs的标准对抗损失(15)。我们将此方法称为“GAN-GP”。对于权重裁剪，我们遵循原始工作 (Arjovsky et al., 2017)，将每层卷积权重的裁剪常数c设置为0.01。对于梯度惩罚，我们将λ设置为10，如Gulrajani et al. (2017)所建议。对于正交归一化，我们用随机选择的正交算子初始化D的每个权重，并使用Brock et al. (2016)中使用的正则化项增强目标函数来训练GANs。在所有比较研究中，我们排除了权重归一化方法中的乘性参数γ，以及批归一化和层归一化方法中的乘性参数。这样做是为了防止这些方法明显违反Lipschitz条件。当我们尝试不同的乘性参数时，实际上无法获得任何改进。

items.en: In this section, we report the accuracy of the spectral normalization (we use the abbreviation: SN-GAN for the spectrally normalized GANs) during the training, and the dependence of the algorithm’s performance on the hyperparmeters of the optimizer. We also compare the performance quality of the algorithm against those of other regularization/normalization techniques for the discriminator networks, including: Weight clipping Arjovsky et al. (2017), WGAN-GP Gulrajani et al. (2017), batch-normalization (BN) Ioffe & Szegedy (2015), layer normalization (LN) Ba et al. (2016), weight normalization (WN) Salimans & Kingma (2016) and orthonormal regularization (orthonormal) Brock et al. (2016). In order to evaluate the stand-alone efficacy of the gradient penalty, we also applied the gradient penalty term to the standard adversarial loss of GANs (15). We would refer to this method as ‘GAN-GP’. For weight clipping, we followed the original work Arjovsky et al. (2017) and set the clipping constant c𝑐c at 0.01 for the convolutional weight of each layer. For gradient penalty, we set λ𝜆\lambda to 10, as suggested in Gulrajani et al. (2017). For orthonormal, we initialized the each weight of D𝐷D with a randomly selected orthonormal operator and trained GANs with the objective function augmented with the regularization term used in Brock et al. (2016). For all comparative studies throughout, we excluded the multiplier parameter 𝜸𝜸{\bm{\gamma}} in the weight normalization method, as well as in batch normalization and layer normalization method. This was done in order to prevent the methods from overtly violating the Lipschitz condition. When we experimented with different multiplier parameter, we were in fact not able to achieve any improvement.
items.zh: 对于优化，我们在所有实验中都使用了Adam优化器 (Kingma & Ba, 2015)。我们测试了6种设置，涉及(1) n_dis，即每次更新生成器时判别器的更新次数，以及(2) Adam的学习率α和一阶、二阶动量参数(β₁, β₂)。我们在附录部分的表1中列出了这些设置的详细信息。在这6种设置中，A、B和C是先前代表性工作中使用的设置。设置D、E和F的目的是评估算法在使用更激进学习率时的性能。关于生成器和判别器中部署的卷积网络架构的详细信息，请参阅附录部分的表3。除非另有说明，所有实验中GAN生成器的更新次数均为100K。

items.en: For optimization, we used the Adam optimizer Kingma & Ba (2015) in all of our experiments. We tested with 6 settings for (1) ndissubscript𝑛disn_{\rm dis}, the number of updates of the discriminator per one update of the generator and (2) learning rate α𝛼\alpha and the first and second order momentum parameters (β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1}, β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2}) of Adam. We list the details of these settings in Table 1 in the appendix section. Out of these 6 settings, A, B, and C are the settings used in previous representative works. The purpose of the settings D, E, and F is to the evaluate the performance of the algorithms implemented with more aggressive learning rates. For the details of the architectures of convolutional networks deployed in the generator and the discriminator, we refer the readers to Table 3 in the appendix section. The number of updates for GAN generator were 100K for all experiments, unless otherwise noted.

Firstly, we inspected the spectral norm of each layer during the training to make sure that our spectral normalization procedure is indeed serving its purpose. As we can see in the Figure 9 in the C.1, the spectral norms of these layers floats around 111–1.051.051.05 region throughout the training. Please see Appendix C.1 for more details.
items.zh: 首先，我们在训练过程中检查了每一层的谱范数，以确保我们的谱归一化程序确实发挥了作用。如附录C.1中的图9所示，这些层的谱范数在整个训练过程中浮动在111–1.051.051.05区域附近。更多细节请参见附录C.1。

items.en: In Figures 1 and 2 we show the inception scores of each method with the settings A–F. We can see that spectral normalization is relatively robust with aggressive learning rates and momentum parameters. WGAN-GP fails to train good GANs at high learning rates and high momentum parameters on both CIFAR-10 and STL-10. Orthonormal regularization performed poorly for the setting E on the STL-10, but performed slightly better than our method with the optimal setting. These results suggests that our method is more robust than other methods with respect to the change in the setting of the training. Also, the optimal performance of weight normalization was inferior to both WGAN-GP and spectral normalization on STL-10, which consists of more diverse examples than CIFAR-10. Best scores of spectral normalization are better than almost all other methods on both CIFAR-10 and STL-10.
items.zh: 在图1和图2中，我们展示了在设置A–F下每种方法的初始分数。我们可以看到，谱归一化在激进的学习率和动量参数下相对鲁棒。WGAN-GP在CIFAR-10和STL-10上，在高学习率和高动量参数下未能训练出好的GAN。正交正则化在STL-10的设置E下表现不佳，但在最优设置下略优于我们的方法。这些结果表明，我们的方法在训练设置变化时比其他方法更鲁棒。此外，权重归一化的最优性能在STL-10上不如WGAN-GP和谱归一化，STL-10包含比CIFAR-10更多样化的样本。在CIFAR-10和STL-10上，谱归一化的最佳分数几乎优于所有其他方法。

items.en: In Tables 2, we show the inception scores of the different methods with optimal settings on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 dataset. We see that SN-GANs performed better than almost all contemporaries on the optimal settings. SN-GANs performed even better with hinge loss (17).444As for STL-10, we also ran SN-GANs over twice time longer iterations because it did not seem to converge. Yet still, this elongated training sequence still completes before WGAN-GP with original iteration size because the optimal setting of SN-GANs (setting B, nd​i​s=1subscript𝑛𝑑𝑖𝑠1n_{dis}=1) is computationally light.. For the training with same number of iterations, SN-GANs fell behind orthonormal regularization for STL-10. For more detailed comparison between orthonormal regularization and spectral normalization, please see section 4.1.2.
items.zh: 在表2中，我们展示了在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上，不同方法在最优设置下的初始分数。我们看到SN-GAN在最优设置下优于几乎所有同期方法。SN-GAN在使用铰链损失时表现更好（17）。对于STL-10，我们还运行了SN-GAN两倍长的迭代次数，因为它似乎没有收敛。然而，这个延长的训练序列仍然在原始迭代大小的WGAN-GP之前完成，因为SN-GAN的最优设置（设置B，ndis=1）计算量轻。对于相同迭代次数的训练，SN-GAN在STL-10上落后于正交正则化。关于正交正则化和谱归一化的更详细比较，请参见第4.1.2节。

items.en: In Figure 6 we show the images produced by the generators trained with WGAN-GP, weight normalization, and spectral normalization. SN-GANs were consistently better than GANs with weight normalization in terms of the quality of generated images. To be more precise, as we mentioned in Section 3, the set of images generated by spectral normalization was clearer and more diverse than the images produced by the weight normalization. We can also see that WGAN-GP failed to train good GANs with high learning rates and high momentums (D,E and F). The generated images with GAN-GP, batch normalization, and layer normalization is shown in Figure 12 in the appendix section.
items.zh: 在图6中，我们展示了由WGAN-GP、权重归一化和谱归一化训练的生成器生成的图像。在生成图像的质量方面，SN-GAN始终优于使用权重归一化的GAN。更准确地说，如第3节所述，谱归一化生成的图像集比权重归一化生成的图像更清晰、更多样化。我们还可以看到，WGAN-GP在高学习率和高动量（D、E和F）下未能训练出好的GAN。使用GAN-GP、批归一化和层归一化生成的图像如附录中的图12所示。

items.en: We also compared our algorithm against multiple benchmark methods ans summarized the results on the bottom half of the Table 2. We also tested the performance of our method on ResNet based GANs used in Gulrajani et al. (2017). Please note that all methods listed thereof are all different in both optimization methods and the architecture of the model. Please see Table 8 and 5 in the appendix section for the detail network architectures. Our implementation of our algorithm was able to perform better than almost all the predecessors in the performance.
items.zh: 我们还将我们的算法与多个基准方法进行了比较，并将结果总结在表2的下半部分。我们还测试了我们的方法在Gulrajani等人（2017）使用的基于ResNet的GAN上的性能。请注意，其中列出的所有方法在优化方法和模型架构上都不同。详细网络架构请参见附录中的表8和表5。我们的算法实现能够在性能上优于几乎所有前代方法。

items.en: In Figure 3, we show the squared singular values of the weight matrices in the final discriminator D𝐷D produced by each method using the parameter that yielded the best inception score. As we predicted in Section 3, the singular values of the first to fifth layers trained with weight clipping and weight normalization concentrate on a few components. That is, the weight matrices of these layers tend to be rank deficit. On the other hand, the singular values of the weight matrices in those layers trained with spectral normalization is more broadly distributed. When the goal is to distinguish a pair of probability distributions on the low-dimensional nonlinear data manifold embedded in a high dimensional space, rank deficiencies in lower layers can be especially fatal. Outputs of lower layers have gone through only a few sets of rectified linear transformations, which means that they tend to lie on the space that is linear in most parts. Marginalizing out many features of the input distribution in such space can result in oversimplified discriminator. We can actually confirm the effect of this phenomenon on the generated images especially in Figure 6(b). The images generated with spectral normalization is more diverse and complex than those generated with weight normalization.
items.zh: 在图3中，我们展示了每种方法使用产生最佳初始分数的参数训练的最终判别器D中权重矩阵的平方奇异值。正如我们在第3节中预测的，使用权重裁剪和权重归一化训练的第一到第五层的奇异值集中在少数几个分量上。也就是说，这些层的权重矩阵倾向于秩亏。另一方面，使用谱归一化训练的这些层的权重矩阵的奇异值分布更广泛。当目标是在嵌入高维空间的低维非线性数据流形上区分一对概率分布时，较低层的秩亏可能尤其致命。较低层的输出只经过了几组修正线性变换，这意味着它们倾向于位于大部分线性的空间上。在这样的空间中边缘化输入分布的许多特征可能导致判别器过于简化。我们实际上可以在生成的图像中确认这种现象的影响，特别是在图6(b)中。使用谱归一化生成的图像比使用权重归一化生成的图像更多样化和复杂。

items.en: On CIFAR-10, SN-GANs is slightly slower than weight normalization (about 110 ∼similar-to\sim 120% computational time), but significantly faster than WGAN-GP. As we mentioned in Section 3, WGAN-GP is slower than other methods because WGAN-GP needs to calculate the gradient of gradient norm ‖∇𝒙D‖2subscriptnormsubscript∇𝒙𝐷2\|\nabla_{{\bm{x}}}D\|_{2}. For STL-10, the computational time of SN-GANs is almost the same as vanilla GANs, because the relative computational cost of the power iteration (18) is negligible when compared to the cost of forward and backward propagation on CIFAR-10 (images size of STL-10 is larger (48×48484848\times 48)). Please see Figure 10 in the appendix section for the actual computational time.
items.zh: 在CIFAR-10上，SN-GAN比权重归一化稍慢（约110~120%的计算时间），但比WGAN-GP快得多。如第3节所述，WGAN-GP比其他方法慢，因为WGAN-GP需要计算梯度范数‖∇xD‖2的梯度。对于STL-10，SN-GAN的计算时间几乎与普通GAN相同，因为幂迭代（18）的相对计算成本与CIFAR-10上的前向和反向传播成本相比可以忽略不计（STL-10的图像尺寸更大（48×48））。实际计算时间请参见附录中的图10。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The effect on the performance on STL-10 induced by the change of the feature map dimension of the final layer. The width of the highlighted region represents standard deviation of the results over multiple seeds of weight initialization. The orthonormal regularization does not perform well with large feature map dimension, possibly because of its design that forces the discriminator to use all dimensions including the ones that are unnecessary. For the setting of the optimizers’ hyper-parameters, We used the setting C, which was optimal for “orthonormal regularization”
items.capZh: 图4：最终层特征图维度变化对STL-10性能的影响。高亮区域的宽度表示多个权重初始化种子结果的标准差。正交正则化在特征图维度较大时表现不佳，可能是因为其设计迫使判别器使用所有维度，包括不必要的维度。对于优化器超参数的设置，我们使用了设置C，这对“正交正则化”是最优的。

items.en: In order to highlight the difference between our spectral normalization and orthonormal regularization, we conducted an additional set of experiments. As we explained in Section 3, orthonormal regularization is different from our method in that it destroys the spectral information and puts equal emphasis on all feature dimensions, including the ones that ’shall’ be weeded out in the training process. To see the extent of its possibly detrimental effect, we experimented by increasing the dimension of the feature space 666More precisely, we simply increased the input dimension and the output dimension by the same factor. In Figure 4, ‘relative size’ = 1.0 implies that the layer structure is the same as the original., especially at the final layer (7th conv) for which the training with our spectral normalization prefers relatively small feature space (dimension <100absent100<100; see Figure 3(b)). As for the setting of the training, we selected the parameters for which the orthonormal regularization performed optimally. The figure 4 shows the result of our experiments. As we predicted, the performance of the orthonormal regularization deteriorates as we increase the dimension of the feature maps at the final layer. Our SN-GANs, on the other hand, does not falter with this modification of the architecture. Thus, at least in this perspective, we may such that our method is more robust with respect to the change of the network architecture.
items.zh: 为了突出我们的谱归一化与正交正则化之间的差异，我们进行了一组额外的实验。如第3节所述，正交正则化与我们的方法不同，它破坏了谱信息，并对所有特征维度给予同等重视，包括那些在训练过程中“应该”被剔除的维度。为了观察其可能的有害影响程度，我们通过增加特征空间的维度进行了实验，特别是在最后一层（第7个卷积层），对于该层，使用我们的谱归一化训练倾向于相对较小的特征空间（维度<100；见图3(b)）。对于训练设置，我们选择了正交正则化表现最优的参数。图4显示了我们的实验结果。正如我们预测的，随着最后一层特征图维度的增加，正交正则化的性能下降。另一方面，我们的SN-GAN在这种架构修改下不会失败。因此，至少从这个角度来看，我们可以说我们的方法对网络架构的变化更鲁棒。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Learning curves for conditional image generation in terms of Inception score for SN-GANs and GANs with orthonormal regularization on ImageNet.
items.capZh: 图5：在ImageNet上，SN-GAN和具有正交正则化的GAN的条件图像生成学习曲线（以初始分数表示）。

items.en: To show that our method remains effective on a large high dimensional dataset, we also applied our method to the training of conditional GANs on ILRSVRC2012 dataset with 1000 classes, each consisting of approximately 1300 images, which we compressed to 128×128128128128\times 128 pixels. Regarding the adversarial loss for conditional GANs, we used practically the same formulation used in Mirza & Osindero (2014), except that we replaced the standard GANs loss with hinge loss (17). Please see Appendix B.3 for the details of experimental settings.
items.zh: 为了证明我们的方法在大型高维数据集上仍然有效，我们还将我们的方法应用于ILRSVRC2012数据集上的条件GAN训练，该数据集有1000个类别，每个类别大约有1300张图像，我们将其压缩为128×128像素。关于条件GAN的对抗损失，我们使用了与Mirza & Osindero (2014)基本相同的公式，只是将标准GAN损失替换为铰链损失（17）。实验设置的详细信息请参见附录B.3。

items.en: GANs without normalization and GANs with layer normalization collapsed in the beginning of training and failed to produce any meaningful images. GANs with orthonormal normalization Brock et al. (2016) and our spectral normalization, on the other hand, was able to produce images. The inception score of the orthonormal normalization however plateaued around 20Kth iterations, while SN kept improving even afterward (Figure 5.) To our knowledge, our research is the first of its kind in succeeding to produce decent images from ImageNet dataset with a single pair of a discriminator and a generator (Figure 7). To measure the degree of mode-collapse, we followed the footstep of Odena et al. (2017) and computed the intra MS-SSIM Odena et al. (2017) for pairs of independently generated GANs images of each class. We see that our SN-GANs ((intra MS-SSIM)=0.101) is suffering less from the mode-collapse than AC-GANs ((intra MS-SSIM)∼similar-to\sim0.25).
items.zh: 没有归一化的GAN和具有层归一化的GAN在训练开始时崩溃，未能生成任何有意义的图像。另一方面，具有正交归一化Brock等人（2016）和我们的谱归一化的GAN能够生成图像。然而，正交归一化的初始分数在大约20K次迭代时趋于平稳，而SN在此之后继续改进（图5）。据我们所知，我们的研究是首次成功使用单对判别器和生成器从ImageNet数据集生成像样图像的研究（图7）。为了衡量模式崩溃的程度，我们遵循Odena等人（2017）的方法，计算了每类独立生成的GAN图像对之间的类内MS-SSIM Odena等人（2017）。我们看到我们的SN-GAN（类内MS-SSIM=0.101）比AC-GAN（类内MS-SSIM~0.25）受模式崩溃的影响更小。

items.en: To ensure that the superiority of our method is not limited within our specific setting, we also compared the performance of SN-GANs against orthonormal regularization on conditional GANs with projection discriminator Miyato & Koyama (2018) as well as the standard (unconditional) GANs. In our experiments, SN-GANs achieved better performance than orthonormal regularization for the both settings (See Figure 15 in the appendix section).
items.zh: 为了确保我们方法的优越性不仅限于我们的特定设置，我们还将SN-GAN与正交正则化在具有投影判别器的条件GAN Miyato & Koyama (2018)以及标准（无条件）GAN上进行了性能比较。在我们的实验中，SN-GAN在两种设置下都取得了比正交正则化更好的性能（参见附录中的图15）。

items.en: This paper proposes spectral normalization as a stabilizer of training of GANs. When we apply spectral normalization to the GANs on image generation tasks, the generated examples are more diverse than the conventional weight normalization and achieve better or comparative inception scores relative to previous studies. The method imposes global regularization on the discriminator as opposed to local regularization introduced by WGAN-GP, and can possibly used in combinations. In the future work, we would like to further investigate where our methods stand amongst other methods on more theoretical basis, and experiment our algorithm on larger and more complex datasets.
items.zh: 本文提出谱归一化作为GAN训练的稳定器。当我们将谱归一化应用于图像生成任务的GAN时，生成的样本比传统的权重归一化更多样化，并且相对于先前的研究取得了更好或可比的初始分数。该方法对判别器施加全局正则化，与WGAN-GP引入的局部正则化相反，并且可能可以结合使用。在未来的工作中，我们希望在更理论的基础上进一步研究我们的方法在其他方法中的地位，并在更大、更复杂的数据集上实验我们的算法。
